{{Quote|Police-droid R-55 at your service!|R-55|<ref name="Gambler's World">"[[Gambler's World]]"</ref>}}
'''R-55''' was a [[Police droid/Legends|police droid]] on [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], R-55 responded when [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] called out for help after [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] had been captured by [[Shadow stormtrooper/Legends|Blackhole troopers]]. [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], however, tricked R-55 into believing that C-3PO had a malfunction so as not to reveal Skywalker and Organa's secret mission to Vorzyd V. Suggesting that C-3PO report to the local repair center, R-55 left again.

Moments later, when a group of [[Freelies]] tried to steal C-3PO, R2-D2 called for R-55's assistance, and the police droid responded by chasing off the criminals.
